Uses of Interface
tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.core.IAdaptationAction

  • Packages that use IAdaptationAction 
    Package Description
    tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker  
    tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions  

    • Uses of IAdaptationAction in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker

      Classes in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker that implement IAdaptationAction 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AbstractDockerAction
      Abstract base class for Docker-based adaptation actions.

    • Uses of IAdaptationAction in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions

      Classes in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions that implement IAdaptationAction 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  ExecCommandAction
      Adaptation action that executes a command inside a running Docker container.
      class  KillContainerAction
      Adaptation action that forcefully kills a Docker container.
      class  PauseContainerAction
      Adaptation action that pauses a running Docker container.
      class  RemoveContainerAction
      Adaptation action that removes a Docker container.
      class  RestartContainerAction
      Adaptation action that restarts a Docker container.
      class  ScaleInAction
      Adaptation action that scales in by removing container replicas.
      class  ScaleOutAction
      Adaptation action that scales out by creating additional container replicas.
      class  StartContainerAction
      Adaptation action that starts a stopped Docker container.
      class  StopContainerAction
      Adaptation action that stops a running Docker container.
      class  UnpauseContainerAction
      Adaptation action that unpauses a paused Docker container.
      class  UpdateResourcesAction
      Adaptation action that updates a container's resource limits (CPU, memory).
